name: ui-ux-pro-max
tagline: ClawHub (168★): UI/UX design intelligence and implementation guidance for building polished interfaces. Use when the user asks for UI desig
verdict: The description itself is the problem: 573 characters of enumerated features instead of a short trigger phrase, so a dispatching agent struggles to tell when to invoke it. No version tracking, and no stated boundary against overlapping design and accessibility skills — real risk of misfire or being ignored.

highlights.summary: The skill depends on reading bundled data files and running an external script, but nowhere addresses missing python3, a failing script, or absent asset/reference files.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body, despite the skill's broad scope overlapping adjacent skills (accessibility-only, frontend code rev
Description is 573 characters, over the 500-char threshold, and reads as an enumerated feature list rather than a terse dispatch string.
